betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Magnetic Antimatter Container§f

§aPortable fluid container for any liquid, including antimatter — 16,000 mB capacity!§f

§bThe Magnetic Antimatter Container§f stores any fluid, including antimatter, with a capacity of §e16,000 mB§f (16 buckets). Expensive but necessary for antimatter transport.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• 5×§f Saturnite Plate
§b• 1×§f Super Conducting Ring Coil
§b→ §eMagnetic Antimatter Container§f

§6Features§f:
§b• Antimatter-safe§f — compatible with all antimatter-class fluids
§b• Portable§f — carry exotic fluids in your inventory
§b• 16,000 mB§f capacity

§eTip§f: Essential for moving antimatter and antischrabidium from the particle accelerator to storage or crafting stations. Use the Heavy Magnetic Storage Tank for bulk stationary storage and these containers for transport!
